title: Glenwood teacher comes out on top at Stellar Awards
description: GEORGE NEWS - A teacher at Glenwood High...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A teacher at Glenwood High School, Kirstin Price, has scooped top national awards for private schools, placing first in the Stellar Teacher Awards receiving the Outstanding Teacher Award.

The flagship ADvTECH celebrations – the Stellar Teacher Awards and the ADvLEARN Celebration of Excellence –  honour exceptional teachers who have made remarkable contributions to teaching and learning.


> The awards celebrated teachers who demonstrate exemplary dedication and commitment to innovation, professional growth and educational excellence, among others.


More than 20 of South Africa’s top private school teachers were recognised at these two award events.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
